methodology: Five KOL candidates per RI patent asset or company, identified via patent inventors, publication co-authors, trial/clinical program pages, company SAB/advisory lists, and web search (June 2026). physician_led_fit reflects suitability for equity + formal KOL advisory per ri_physician_led_financing.json—not a recommendation to contact without COI review.
physician_led_note: Prefer MD/DO with RI or Brown Health/RIH/W&I/VA Providence ties for Slater-match packaging. PhD scientific founders listed where they anchor evidence but equity+KOL physician-led formation typically requires licensed clinician on cap table or SAB.
